description: Svelte stack — Svelte 5 (runes) + SvelteKit 2 static SPA + Zod 4 family.

deps.@sveltejs/kit: 2 (adapter-static SPA mode — ssr off, fallback index.html)
deps.@tanstack/svelte-query: 6 (runes-native: createQuery(() => opts) returns a reactive object — same .data/.isPending/.mutate surface as the react packs' hooks)
deps.zod: 4 (^4.0.0 — same family as stack v3 so wire schemas match the react packs)

bundler.comment: No in-browser playground bundling for svelte packs yet (svelte-frontend-plan.md defers playground preview), so no bundler policy beyond the defaults.
